hints.description: This company focuses on women’s health, developing and commercializing medical technologies and diagnostics. Their offerings include products for diagnostics, medical imaging, and surgical solutions, particularly in areas like cervical cancer screening, breast health, and bone health. CEO Stephen MacKenna leads a company known for its innovation in improving women’s well-being globally.
hints.funFact1: In 1986, the company began as a joint venture between Elxsi and Astra, initially focused on laser technology for medical applications before evolving into its current focus.
hints.funFact2: The company acquired Molecular Diagnostics (MDx) in 2020, significantly expanding its presence in infectious disease testing, including a rapid expansion of COVID-19 testing capabilities during the pandemic.
